glosses.vi: đố vui; bài kiểm tra ngắn

translations.es: Hoy vamos a hacer un cuestionario.
translations.yue: 我哋今日玩個問答遊戲。
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta làm một bài trắc nghiệm.
translations.hi: आज हम एक क्विज़ कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag tar vi en quiz.
translations.da: I dag laver vi en quiz.

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb specifying the time of the event.
Main lexical verb in finite present (1st person plural) meaning 'to do/make'.
Personal pronoun in nominative plural functioning as the subject.
Indefinite article marking a singular neuter noun in the accusative object position.
Neuter common noun functioning as the direct object.

sentences.target: Ich habe das Quiz im Café gewonnen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə das kvɪs ɪm kaˈfeː ɡəˈvɔnən/

translations.de: Ich habe das Quiz im Café gewonnen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə das kvɪs ɪm kaˈfeː ɡəˈvɔnən/
translations.en: I won the quiz at the café.
translations.es: Gané el concurso de preguntas en la cafetería.
translations.fr: J'ai gagné le quiz au café.
translations.it: Ho vinto il quiz al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在咖啡馆的问答比赛中赢了。
translations.yue: 我喺咖啡店嘅問答遊戲贏咗。
translations.pt: Eu ganhei o quiz no café.
translations.vi: Tôi đã thắng cuộc đố vui ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Ik heb de quiz in het café gewonnen.
translations.hi: मैंने कैफ़े में क्विज़ जीत लिया.
translations.ja: カフェのクイズで優勝した。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular functioning as the subject.
Auxiliary 'haben' in finite present (1st person singular) forming the present perfect.
Definite article for a neuter singular noun in accusative, introducing the direct object.
Neuter common noun serving as the direct object.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative NP indicating location.
Common noun in dative singular governed by the preposition, indicating the place.
Past participle of the lexical verb forming the present perfect with 'haben'.

sentences.target: Unsere Klasse macht ein Quiz zur Geschichte.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈklasə maxt aɪ̯n kvɪs tsuːɐ̯ ɡəˈʃɪçtə/

translations.de: Unsere Klasse macht ein Quiz zur Geschichte.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈklasə maxt aɪ̯n kvɪs tsuːɐ̯ ɡəˈʃɪçtə/
translations.en: Our class is doing a quiz about history.
translations.es: Nuestra clase está haciendo un cuestionario de historia.
translations.fr: Notre classe fait un quiz sur l'histoire.
translations.it: La nostra classe sta facendo un quiz di storia.
translations.ko: 우리 반은 역사 퀴즈를 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们班在做历史小测验。
translations.yue: 我哋班做緊歷史小測驗。
translations.ru: Наш класс проводит викторину по истории.
translations.pt: Nossa turma está fazendo um quiz de história.
translations.tr: Sınıfımız tarih hakkında bir bilgi yarışması yapıyor.
translations.vi: Lớp chúng tôi đang làm bài trắc nghiệm về lịch sử.
translations.nl: Onze klas doet een quiz over geschiedenis.
translations.uk: Наш клас проводить вікторину з історії.
translations.hi: हमारी कक्षा इतिहास पर एक क्विज़ कर रही है.
translations.pl: Nasza klasa robi quiz z historii.
translations.el: Η τάξη μας κάνει ένα κουίζ για την ιστορία.
translations.nb: Klassen vår tar en quiz om historie.
translations.id: Kelas kami sedang mengerjakan kuis sejarah.
translations.sv: Vår klass gör ett quiz om historia.
translations.ro: Clasa noastră face un quiz despre istorie.
translations.cs: Naše třída dělá kvíz z historie.
translations.da: Vores klasse laver en quiz om historie.
translations.ja: うちのクラスは歴史のクイズをしている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with the head noun (feminine singular nominative).
Common noun functioning as the subject (feminine singular nominative).
Main lexical verb in finite present (3rd person singular).
Indefinite article marking a singular neuter noun in accusative as the object.
Neuter common noun functioning as the direct object.
Contraction of 'zu der'; preposition governing dative, indicating topic/purpose.
Common noun in dative singular as the complement of the preposition.

sentences.target: Tom liebt das Quiz am Freitag.

translations.de: Tom liebt das Quiz am Freitag.
translations.en: Tom loves the quiz on Friday.
translations.es: A Tom le encanta el concurso de preguntas del viernes.
translations.fr: Tom adore le quiz du vendredi.
translations.it: Tom adora il quiz del venerdì.
translations.zh-Hans: 汤姆很喜欢周五的问答。
translations.yue: Tom好鍾意星期五嘅問答遊戲。
translations.pt: Tom adora o quiz de sexta-feira.
translations.he: טום מאוד אוהב את החידון של יום שישי.
translations.tr: Tom cuma günkü bilgi yarışmasını çok seviyor.
translations.vi: Tom rất thích buổi đố vui vào thứ Sáu.
translations.nl: Tom houdt van de quiz op vrijdag.
translations.hi: टॉम को शुक्रवार वाला क्विज़ बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Ο Τομ λατρεύει το κουίζ της Παρασκευής.
translations.id: Tom sangat suka kuis hari Jumat.
translations.ja: トムは金曜のクイズが大好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Proper name functioning as the subject (nominative singular).
Main lexical verb in finite present (3rd person singular).
Definite article for a neuter singular noun in accusative, introducing the direct object.
Neuter common noun functioning as the direct object.
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition with dative forming a temporal PP.
Proper noun (day of the week) in dative as the object of the preposition; temporal adjunct.
